title: Edge Security, WAF, Hotlinking, Headers, and Failure Containment · Runtime Contract: Hotlink Origin Secret
summary: A public distribution trusts Referer as authorization, caches private errors, lacks browser security headers, and forwards bot bursts to an expensive origin. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the hotlink origin secret increment in layered edge-security and abuse-control plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat Referer hotlink controls as a weak cost signal and use signed access or a controlled origin header only within its actual threat boundary.
Apply WAF, rate limits, bot controls, request size and method rules with false-positive, cost, accessibility, and bypass evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Hotlink Origin Secret · Theory Hotlink Origin Secret
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 8358 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to layer application authorization, WAF, origin protection, headers, and safe error caching; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then cancel halfway through and prove every body, part, and goroutine reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Treat Referer hotlink controls as a weak cost signal and use signed access or a controlled origin header only within its actual threat boundary.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Hotlink Origin Secret contract for the supplied data.
